节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

注释信息: @param { UIAbilityContext } context - The context that initiates to enter Kiosk mode.
@returns { Promise<void> } The promise returned by the function.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000050 - Failed to connect to the system service.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000110 - The current application is not in Kiosk app list and cannot enter Kiosk mode.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000111 - The system is already in Kiosk mode and cannot enter Kiosk mode again.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000113 - Current ability is not in foreground.

parameters.说明: The context that initiates to enter Kiosk mode.

节点.return_description: The promise returned by the function.

error_codes.description: Failed to connect to the system service.
The current application is not in Kiosk app list and cannot enter Kiosk mode.
The system is already in Kiosk mode and cannot enter Kiosk mode again.
Current ability is not in foreground.

@throws { BusinessError } 16000112 - The current application is not in Kiosk mode and cannot exit Kiosk mode.
